[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0001001000 2
2 0100001000 2
3 0000001000 1
4 1010101001 5

6 0010100001 3
7 0100101010 4
